where.if: AND (1=0 OR l.user_id LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR l.login_id LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND l.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhUserLoginLog :: selectById */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS user_nm , cd_lr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM syh_user_login_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_lr ON cd_lr.code_grp = 'LOGIN_RESULT' AND cd_lr.code_value = l.result_cd WHERE l.log_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhUserLoginLog :: selectList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS user_nm , cd_lr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM syh_user_login_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_lr ON cd_lr.code_grp = 'LOGIN_RESULT' AND cd_lr.code_value = l.result_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhUserLoginLog :: selectPageList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS user_nm , cd_lr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM syh_user_login_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_lr ON cd_lr.code_grp = 'LOGIN_RESULT' AND cd_lr.code_value = l.result_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.sy :: SyhUserLoginLog :: selectPageCount */ FROM syh_user_login_log l
